docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAS NOT PRESENT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REYES, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT HINDS, KATHLEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
